channel.title: newsletters on Daniel-Andrei Minca
channel.description: Recent content in newsletters on Daniel-Andrei Minca

item.title: Sources I use for keeping up with IT news
item.description: As you may already know, keeping up with the news in the IT sector is necessary not only to further develop/extend your skillset but also it’s interesting to see how others tackle some issues as there are multiple schools of thought. This domain is to me the most fascinating because no matter how many certifications or diplomas you have at hand and no matter how much you know, you need to be a good team player.
